workstreams.objective: Freeze project, rational media clock, reference authority, color pipeline, and output contracts.
Publish shot, keyframe, camera, identity, anatomy, lighting, and material continuity authority.
Model primary, micro, secondary, contact, fabric, hair, fluid, camera, and settling motion.
Route exact video bundles per shot/pass and compare bounded candidates without latent-family leakage.
Create frame truth, calibrated temporal QA, defect localization, and immutable-parent span repair.
Qualify long-form continuity, benchmark engines, measure uncertainty, and issue scoped video certificates.
Compile owned audio events and route recorded, retrieved, procedural, neural, synthesized, or hybrid sources.
Bind character voice, pronunciation, performance, breath, nonverbal vocalization, alignment, and visemes.
Render force/material-aware foley and physically coherent room, occlusion, distance, and spatial objects.
Mix nondestructive stems, master to profiles, preserve clocks, and repair only failed AV spans.
Run objective and perceptual audio/AV QA, calibrated critics, learning reports, and scoped release.
Deliver project, character, scene, shot, mask, image, video, audio, AV, and timeline information architecture.
Expose typed commands/queries, live DAG state, comparisons, explanations, repair, and approvals.
Expose model evidence, workers, leases, queues, incidents, reconciliation, recovery, and audit history.
Enforce roles, local credential isolation, accessibility, responsive behavior, tests, deployment, and release.
